prompt: Evaluate this design: a landing page with 3 different fonts (Inter, Playfair Display, and Fira Code used for body text), cards with mixed border-radius (8px on some, 16px on others, 24px on the CTA), #FFFFFF text on #1A1A1A background, section spacing of 45px, button padding of 11px, and a purple-to-pink gradient hero background. The body text is 13px.

assertions.text: Flags the 3-font violation (Inter + Playfair Display + Fira Code)
Flags 13px body text as below 14px minimum
Flags 45px or 11px spacing as not on 8px grid
Overall grade is D or F
